title: Easy Feed and Breed
description: Easy Feed and Breed for fabric - Throw food at animals to feed them and breed them
body:
Throw food at animals to feed them and breed them.

They will look for food on the ground around them, pick it up and eat and breed.
Note that this does not tame animals!

Who eats which food:
* Bees: flowers - poppy, etc
* Chicken: seeds of wheat, beetroots, melons and pumpkins
* Cats and ocelots: raw cod and raw salmon.
* Cows and sheep: wheat
* Pigs: carrots, potatoes, and beetroots
* Rabbits: carrots, golden carrots, dandelions
* Turtles: seagrass
Throw food at animals to feed them and breed them.

Short demo:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/GNB450jH7n0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Have fun!

MaxVar

P.S. This is another mod created after "Dad, my mod is no longer working in 1.15.2! Can't you fix it?!"
